title: ジャパンCの後に・跳ね返されても

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the end of their serious bout, Meisho Doto
loses to T.M. Opera O. However, the two
establish a rivalry at last.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O presses Meisho Doto, wondering
why she's never shown this level of effort before.
The two laugh together and promise to no longer
hold back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This new step in their relationship also manifests
in better lap times, convincing Air Shakur the two
have broken past their previous stat ceiling.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's no longer certain who will emerge victorious in
the race against the previous generation. The two
head for the Arima Kinen as true competitors.
